CustomField.label: Vendor Contact Display
CustomField.formula: Vendor_1_Email__c & IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Vendor_1_Email__c)), OR(NOT(ISBLANK(Vendor_1_Mobile__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Vendor_1_Phone__c)))), " ", "") & Vendor_1_Mobile__c & IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Vendor_1_Mobile__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Vendor_1_Phone__c))), ", ", "") & Vendor_1_Phone__c
CustomField.description: Formatted vendor contact: email, mobile, phone - comma separated, only showing available values
